name: PreDB_Check
author: Aypro
about: Validates queued NZB names against srrDB's API to mark non-scene/P2P releases as BAD.
requirements: Requires Python 3 and internet access to srrDB API.
description: Monitors NZB_ADDED queue events. Compares the release name against srrDB. Marks the download as BAD if it's not a verified scene release, allowing Radarr/Sonarr to blacklist it via Failed Download Handling.

options.name: TargetCategory
description: Only check downloads in this specific NZBGet category. Leave blank to process all queued files.

options.name: FailOpen
description: If the srrDB API experiences an outage, select yes to gracefully allow the download, or no to proactively block it.

commands.name: TestConnection
description: Click to test connectivity to the srrDB API.
